text: Leadership About Vision How We Operate What We Create How We Collaborate Looking Ahead Data Index About Meta META BUILDS TECHNOLOGIES THAT HELP PEOPLE CONNECT, BUILD COMMUNITIES AND GROW BUSINESSES. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram, and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) to help build the next evolution in social technology. We have offices in more than 90 cities across North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, Asia Pacific and Latin America. We also own 21 data center locations globally. 2023 Meta Sustainability Report 5
